version_policy: Use the local midnight-research source tree as the build-compatible source of truth. Public docs can lag behind release-candidate source.
notes: C++ owns HTTP, JSON-RPC, GraphQL, WebSocket, artifacts, confirmation, and state-cache orchestration.
Rust FFI owns canonical ledger transaction build, wallet derivation, native validation, tx hash/verify, and deploy contract-address extraction.
Compact argument encoding must come from compiled Compact/toolkit artifacts, not ad-hoc C++ SCALE helpers.
